summary: Full E2E validation of DEIS app. Backend: 18/18 pytest tests passed (health, students, performance, weak-topics, recommendations LLM, predict, quizzes, attempt persistence, teacher overview/heatmap/at-risk, AI tutor chat + history, all 404 cases). Frontend: Landing renders both role cards. Student dashboard loads 4 stat cards, performance chart, weak topics, AI recommendations, practice quizzes grid, AI Tutor chat. AI Tutor sends and receives Claude reply. Teacher dashboard loads KPI cards, at-risk panel, student roster. Roster and at-risk navigation works. Found ONE blocking UI bug: 'Made with Emergent' floating badge overlaps the Submit quiz button (bottom-right) making the quiz submit click get intercepted.

ui_bugs.issue: Submit Quiz button (bottom-right corner) is overlapped by the floating 'Made with Emergent' badge, preventing user clicks from reaching submit-quiz-btn. Backend /api/quizzes/{id}/attempt works fine — issue is purely UI overlay.

Bar chart renders axis labels (Geometry, English Grammar, Physics, Algebra, Biology, World History) and grid lines but no bars are visible. Possible Recharts data/key mismatch (subject_avg keys vs chart dataKey).

issues: Submit Quiz button placed in bottom-right floating area collides with 'Made with Emergent' badge. Move submit button inline at bottom of questions list, or add bottom padding/safe-area for the badge.

action_items: Move Submit Quiz button out of bottom-right corner (or add z-index / margin-bottom) so 'Made with Emergent' badge does not intercept clicks.
Fix Teacher dashboard Subject Performance bar chart — bars not rendering. Verify Recharts dataKey matches subject_avg field in API response.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~635 lines but cohesive; consider splitting routes (students/quizzes/teacher/ai-tutor) into separate routers if it grows.
_student_stats() is recomputed for every student in /api/teacher/* endpoints — N round-trips to Mongo. For 10 students it's fine but won't scale; consider single aggregation pipeline.
Recommendations endpoint regex '\[.*\]' with re.DOTALL may match wrong span if Claude returns nested arrays — works today, brittle long-term.
All endpoints correctly exclude _id; Pydantic models defined but several routes return raw dicts (acceptable for MVP).

success_rate.frontend: ~85% (quiz submit blocked by overlay; teacher bar chart bars missing)

test_credentials: None — no auth in this demo. Used stu_001 and qz_001.
seed_data_creation: Seed data already created by backend on first startup (10 students stu_001..stu_010, 6 quizzes qz_001..qz_006, ~123 attempts). Tests added a couple of TEST_ attempts via /api/quizzes/qz_001/attempt for stu_001; harmless.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is solid (18/18). Two frontend issues remain: (1) Submit-quiz-btn overlapped by 'Made with Emergent' badge in bottom-right of QuizPage — visible clearly in screenshot at .screenshots/quiz_done.png. Backend POST works when called directly. (2) Teacher Subject Performance bar chart shows no bars (data API returns subject_avg dict correctly per backend test). After fix, re-run only the Quiz submit playwright flow + teacher bar chart screenshot.
rca of the issue: QuizPage Submit button: Likely the submit button is positioned with fixed/absolute styles in bottom-right OR the parent container has insufficient bottom padding, allowing the Emergent badge (also fixed, bottom-right) to overlap. Reproduction: Open /student/stu_001/quiz/qz_001, fill all 5 answers, attempt to click 'Submit quiz' button — click is intercepted by 'Made with Emergent' badge. Mitigation: (a) move submit button to a non-bottom-right location or center it, (b) add `mb-16` or similar bottom margin to the submit button container, (c) ensure submit button z-index > Emergent badge.
